title: Why “what time is the fifa game today” is trending in CA: 500+ searches, the facts (July 18, 2026)
description: “what time is the fifa game today” is trending in CA with 500+ searches reported by Google. The verified coverage behind the spike, from FOX Sports and 2 more.
keyword: what time is the fifa game today

sources.title: How to Watch the World Cup Today: Schedule, Times, TV, Streaming for Bronze Final
What soccer games are today? Breaking down World Cup schedule for July 18

sections.heading: What is trending: “what time is the fifa game today”
paragraphs: “what time is the fifa game today” appeared on Google Trends' Trending Now list for CA (snapshot taken 2026-07-18T19:33:37+00:00 UTC). Google reports at least 500 searches for this term — that figure is a lower bound published in the official Trends feed, not an exact count.

sections.heading: What's behind the spike — the coverage
paragraphs: The Trends feed associates this search spike with 3 news stories from FOX Sports, Los Angeles Times, USA Today. The headlines, exactly as published:
list: “How to Watch the World Cup Today: Schedule, Times, TV, Streaming for Bronze Final” — FOX Sports
“What soccer games are today? Breaking down World Cup schedule for July 18” — USA Today
“World Cup championship and third-place game: Start times and how to watch” — Los Angeles Times

sections.heading: Timeline
paragraphs: The trend entry was published to the Google Trends feed at Sat, 18 Jul 2026 11:30:00 -0700. Our snapshot was taken at 2026-07-18T19:33:37+00:00 UTC and this briefing was assembled at 2026-07-18T19:33:48+00:00 UTC.

sections.heading: How to read these numbers
paragraphs: Google Trends reports approximate search volume as a lower bound (for example “20K+”). Actual volume can be significantly higher. Trending status reflects acceleration in searches, not the absolute size of a topic. For the full story behind the spike, read the cited coverage below — this briefing intentionally adds no speculation beyond the sourced facts.

Breaking down World Cup schedule for July 18” (USA Today); “World Cup championship and third-place game: Start times and how to watch” (Los Angeles Times).

faq.q: How many people searched for “what time is the fifa game today”?
faq.a: Google reports at least 500 searches in CA as of the feed snapshot. This is a published lower bound, not an exact count.

faq.q: Where is “what time is the fifa game today” trending?
faq.a: This snapshot covers CA. The same term may trend differently in other regions.
